about.title: About NoahSwitch
about.paragraph1: NoahSwitch is more than just a provider of technology training and services; it is a movement that aspires to make a lasting impact. At the core lies a team of experts who are passionate about their craft and committed to excellence.
about.paragraph2: With a commitment to transparency and a willingness to adapt, NoahSwitch is constantly evolving, embracing new concepts that align with its core values of expertise, dedication, forward-thinking, and inclusivity.

themes.title: Karaoke & Restaurant Themes
themes.intro: Explore homepage concepts crafted for karaoke venues and restaurants. Browse one full demo at a time, then open the live preview in a new tab.

portfolio.title: Barber, Nail & Portfolio Themes
portfolio.intro: Homepage concepts for barbershops, nail salons, and personal or agency portfolios. Same showcase experience — preview one theme at a time or open the full page.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.intro: Launch your professional online presence today. Choose the package that fits your needs — or reach out for something fully tailored.
pricing.nichesNote: Perfect for barber shops, nail salons, restaurants, personal brands, and portfolio sites.

basic.title: Basic Website
basic.subtitle: A polished, high-performance static business site — everything you need to look professional online.

features.sections: All standard sections (hero, about, services, contact)
features.domain: Free domain name included — a gift from us!

basic.emailNote: Note: Email provider setup is not included in this price. Cost depends on your domain registrar and the email features you need (e.g. custom inboxes, aliases, forwarding).
